query: INSERT INTO config_candidates (candidate_id, status, document, message, validation, created_at, activated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7) ON CONFLICT (candidate_id) DO UPDATE SET status = EXCLUDED.status, document = EXCLUDED.document, message = EXCLUDED.message, validation = EXCLUDED.validation, created_at = EXCLUDED.created_at, activated_at = EXCLUDED.activated_at
